text: As I enter this modern, brightly lit space, an atmosphere of curiosity and anticipation washes over me. The clean lines and glass doors give an impression of transparency and innovation—a place designed to invite exploration. Moving closer to the R+D exhibit, I am struck by the interplay between human ingenuity and technological advancement. There is a quiet hum of discovery that urges me to reflect: What does it mean to be inquisitive, to always search for connection—between ourselves, our creations, and the world? I feel a sense of belonging among other seekers, their fascination mirrored in my own wonder.
